name: VOID CRAWLER
short_description: Void Crawler is a horror game set in a dystopian future, where you pilot a vehicle nicknamed 'The Mole' into a mysterious void deep within the Earth to collect an extremely valuable material for a company dedicated to solving the world's energy crisis.
detailed_description:
Void Crawler is a first-person horror game set in a dystopian future. You pilot a drilling vehicle nicknamed “The Mole” into a mysterious underground void to extract a rare and powerful crystal for a corporation that claims it can solve the world’s energy crisis.

You play as Marcus Everett, a veteran tank operator and machinery expert, who has withdrawn from duty after the tragic loss of his 12-year-old daughter. His grief is interrupted by an unexpected call from Void Energies, offering him a lucrative contract: return to the driver’s seat, and put his skills to use in exchange for a life-changing paycheck.

Features

  • Navigate the darkness using The Mole’s infrared camera and radar, uncovering hidden dangers and secrets.

  • Immerse yourself in dread through a first-person perspective that heightens the claustrophobic atmosphere.

  • Survive under pressure by managing The Mole’s vital systems — battery, oil, and coolant. Extracting crystals drains your power, so timely deliveries to the dock are essential.

  • Operate heavy machinery with intense, tactile gameplay as you drill deeper into the void.

  • Face psychological horror with hallucinations, fear, and escalating tension that test your sanity.

  • Experience gritty visuals that amplify the oppressive, industrial tone of the world.

⚠️ Warning: This game contains flashing lights and visual effects that may trigger seizures in individuals with photosensitive epilepsy.
